observations.title: commit-push.ts:267 は push-as-is ではなく push after pipeline commit
observations.rationale: request の「現状コードの前提」で :242,267 を「push-as-is 経路」として列挙しているが、line 267 は staged changes が存在する場合の pipeline commit 後の push であり push-as-is ではない。push-as-is 経路は line 242 のみ。line 267 は合成モデル移行後も残る経路であり、廃止対象は line 242 の分岐のみ。実装者の混乱を防ぐため design step で明確化を推奨。

toolResult.reason:
Designed the inspection→synthesis model change for making the pipeline the sole committer. Wrote spec.md (self-contained Layer-1 behavioral contract with Requirements/Scenarios covering sequential synthesis via mixed reset + explicit pathspec, bare `git add -A` elimination, commitFinalState managed-path limitation, parallel-round HEAD guard, egress publish-range verification, fail-closed git ops, bite-evidence-result.md inclusion for #888, and commitOid semantic invariance), design.md (Context/Goals/Decisions D1–D8 with rationale and rejected alternatives — mixed reset over hard reset, state-recorded synthesizedCommits ledger over message/trailer identification, single egress via `git rev-list HEAD --not --remotes=origin`; Risks/Trade-offs; enumerated the inspection-model tests to migrate and the revision/canon-binding tests to keep unchanged), and tasks.md (T-01…T-17 ordered by dependency with per-task Acceptance Criteria mapping to the request's acceptance criteria, including R6-1/R6-2 real-git E2E and destruction-confirmation tasks).

Verified in-scope assertions not pre-attested: the 4 push sites (pushOnly ×2, commitFinalState, propagateVerificationResult), pipelineManagedPaths single-source usage, that commitRoundArtifacts does not return the round commit OID, and biteEvidenceResultPath. All files under specrunner/changes/pipeline-sole-committer/ on branch change/pipeline-sole-committer-561baf30. No source edits performed; no ADR paths referenced (per project rules).</reason>
</invoke>
